aggregator-pulse.purpose: Swiggy + Zomato partner portal data scraping. Powers /ops/aggregator/he/swiggy and /ops/aggregator/he/zomato dashboards.
do_not_disturb: chrome.exe processes in default user profile (do not run taskkill /IM chrome.exe)
the HN-Aggregator-Watchdog scheduled task (do not delete or reschedule)
Chrome RestoreOnStartup registry policy (other chats can add their own keys but not remove)
aggregator-pulse.fix_when_broken: If pipeline silent for >30 min: 1) ssh hn-winpc check Chrome alive, 2) check watchdog log, 3) reload extension manually if needed. See fleet/HOWTO-USE-WINPC.md.

tailscale.purpose: Network bridge laptop ↔ hn-winpc, works on any internet
tailscale.do_not_disturb: Never stop the Tailscale service. If laptop SSH fails, fix on laptop side, not by touching the PC's Tailscale.

openssh_server.do_not_disturb: Never disable sshd or remove the laptop pubkey from administrators_authorized_keys.

auto_login.purpose: Survive reboots without human at PC
auto_login.do_not_disturb: Never call netplwiz UI or modify HKLM\...\Winlogon\AutoAdminLogon.
